note_fr_mmt4_kept_responsibilities: FR-MMT4 suppression only affects the Lead's consolidated-report production. Cross-domain reviewer-to-reviewer messages are unaffected — they are a separate communication channel.

findings.title: SQL injection in searchUsers (confirmed via cross-domain tip)
findings.description: Raw string concatenation in SQL query confirmed exploitable. Cross-domain tip from code-reviewer prompted security-focused investigation.
